title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now integrates local AI model providers including LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling developers to run coding assistants on-device. The integration supports Gemma-4 12B and Qwen models for code explanation, refactoring, boilerplate generation, and privacy-preserving workflows.
